overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia exploring a sunlit medieval courtyard with overgrown vegetation, cobblestone paths, and half-timbered buildings, before entering a dimly lit interior space with stained glass windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit medieval courtyard with central ancient tree

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the courtyard, circling around the large central tree and stone fountain

entered.detail: massive gnarled tree with thick trunk and sprawling branches providing dappled shade
circular stone fountain structure with tiered levels, dry and weathered
traditional medieval building with exposed wooden beams and plaster walls
decorative wooden lattice fencing with geometric patterns, partially covered in ivy
red brick wall covered in dense green ivy and climbing plants

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a sunlit medieval courtyard, passing a large ancient tree and dry stone fountain. The cobblestone ground is patchy with overgrown grass, and ivy-covered brick walls line the perimeter.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard perimeter path along lattice fence

events.description: character stops walking and looks upward at the tree canopy, pausing briefly before continuing

agents.ego_description: walking along the courtyard wall, pausing to look up at the tree branches overhead, then continuing toward the building entrance

entered.detail: simple wooden bench sitting against the lattice fence
weathered stone wall with small windows and wooden shutters

segments.scene_description: Walking along the narrow perimeter path beside the wooden lattice fence, Geralt pauses to look up at the tree canopy. The stone walls of the surrounding buildings cast long shadows across the cobblestones.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance transition from courtyard to interior

events.description: character opens wooden door and steps from the bright courtyard into the dark building interior
lighting shifts dramatically from bright midday sun to dim interior illuminated only by stained glass windows

agents.ego_description: approaching the heavy wooden door, pushing it open, and stepping inside the dimly lit room

entered.detail: heavy wooden door with iron hinges and weathered planks
wooden workbench covered with tools, papers, and debris
medieval stained glass window with blue and yellow panes casting colored light

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches the building entrance, opens the heavy wooden door, and steps inside. The scene transitions from bright sunlight to a dim interior space with stained glass windows casting colored light onto wooden floors.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit medieval interior room with scattered furniture

agents.ego_description: walking slowly around the dark interior, examining the room and looking out through the stained glass windows

entered.detail: dark wooden paneled walls with beams and medieval construction
tall wooden shelving units with books and objects
doorway leading to another dark room or corridor

segments.scene_description: Inside the dimly lit medieval room, Geralt explores the space, passing by wooden shelves and stained glass windows. The interior features dark wooden walls, scattered papers on the floor, and furniture suggesting this was once a workshop or study.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, overgrown medieval courtyard into the dim, atmospheric interior of a scholar's study. It begins with Geralt walking across patchy cobblestones past an ancient tree and a dry stone fountain, surrounded by ivy-covered brick walls. As he follows a narrow perimeter path beside a wooden lattice fence, the camera captures the shift in light as the surrounding buildings cast long shadows across the ground. The scene then transitions abruptly as Geralt opens a heavy wooden door, moving from the brilliant sunlight into a muted interior where stained glass windows cast colorful light onto wooden floors. Finally, the camera explores the dark wooden walls of the room, passing scattered papers and dusty shelves that reveal the space as a former workshop.
